or patient nonresponsive. CHAR 2 x x
M0410_SPEECH (M0410) Speech Speech and oral (verbal) expression of language in patient's own language. 00 = Expresses complex ideas, feelings, and needs clearly, completely, and easily in all situations with no observable impairment.
01 = Minimal difficulty in expressing ideas and needs (may take extra time; makes passional errors in word choice, grammar or speech intelligibility; needs minimal prompting or assistance).
02 = Expresses simple ideas or needs
